## Feature Summary

<!-- A clear one-line summary of what you want -->

## Problem or Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is this feature needed? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature in detail. How should it work? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposal better? -->

## Module or Area Affected

<!-- Which part of CyberTuz does this relate to? -->
- [ ] New module
- [ ] Existing module (specify): 
- [ ] Language system / translations
- [ ] Training Arena
- [ ] Mission System
- [ ] Main launcher / menu
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: 

## Ethical Consideration

<!-- Confirm that this feature is for educational and authorized use only -->
- [ ] This feature serves a legitimate educational purpose
- [ ] This feature does not facilitate unauthorized access to systems
- [ ] This feature follows CyberTuz's ethical use standards
